personal.name: Bintang Muhammad
personal.title: Business Intelligence & Data Analyst
personal.subtitle: BINTANG MUHAMMAD
personal.summary: Business Intelligence Analyst with a Master's in Applied Business Analytics and 4+ years of expertise in Python, SQL, and data visualization. Experienced working with clients across diverse industries including Fashion, Food & Beverage, and Retail. Bridges technical analysis with stakeholder communication to drive strategic decisions, transforming complex datasets into actionable insights through automated reporting and interactive dashboards. Actively expanding into the cryptocurrency space with hands-on experience in spot trading, technical analysis, and on-chain analytics via Dune Analytics.

skills.name: Python & Django
skills.description: Building automated data processing suites, extracting querysets, developing backend client dashboards, and running predictive machine learning pipelines.

skills.name: SQL & ClickHouse
skills.description: Constructing fast queries, indexing large-scale transaction databases, and setting up persistent reporting pipelines using ClickHouse & Metabase.

skills.name: Data Visualization
skills.description: Designing interactive executive-facing dashboards, automating scheduled client delivery, and building cohesive storyboards for business reviews.

skills.name: Cloud & Pipelines
skills.description: Deploying data pipelines and reporting scripts on AWS S3 / GCP, creating automated CRON loops, and managing static types.

skills.name: On-Chain & BI Analytics
skills.description: Conducting technical charting, exploring spot trading mechanics, analyzing cryptocurrency transaction trees, and building on-chain dashboards.

experience.title: Business Intelligence Analyst
highlights: Delivered 30+ customized routine reports for clients such as Levi's, Burger King, Kawan Lama Group, and Tim Hortons Singapore, covering data on orders, demographics, communications, campaigns, and employee compensation to support their decision-making needs.

Handled client-specific ad-hoc data requests (excluding routine reports), including product performance analysis, spillover impact analysis, cohort analysis, customer movement tracking, segmentation/clustering, forecasting, store-level investigative insights, and A/B testing.

Generated on average 100k - 800k user lists for targeted marketing campaigns (e.g., WhatsApp, email, offline events), using strict client-defined criteria such as average transaction value, last transaction location and time, and customer profile attributes.

Developed targeted machine learning models using Scikit-Learn, resulting in a 22.31% increase in email click-through rates and a 184.36% boost in revenue per open email. Worked across the full process—from data extraction via Django querysets, preprocessing with Pandas and NumPy, to model training and user prediction on an ad-hoc basis.

Bridged communication between technical and non-technical stakeholders by translating data insights into clear, actionable language. Worked closely with both the marketing team and clients to align on report objectives, ensuring clarity and preventing miscommunication.
Engineered and took initiative in exploring user-based Association Rule recommendation systems, enabling personalized product suggestions for approximately 900,000 users via Email and WhatsApp.

Built more than 20 interactive Metabase dashboards for internal teams and routine reporting using SQL and ClickHouse database, while also developing, maintaining, and debugging Python-based backend dashboards for clients.

Resolved Sentry-reported issues by optimizing code and addressing logic flaws, and implemented data and reporting automation (e.g., push notification tracking, order data processing, and automated report delivery to S3). Corrected over 1 million data entries through close collaboration with developers, and established robust data validation protocols that eliminated presentation-level errors.

Developed downloadable reports based on client-specific business rules for clients such as Pancious and Cimory, investigated anomalies using Jupyter Notebook, and deployed fixes directly in production.

Maintained production-grade code quality through comprehensive CI/CD workflows, implementing static type checking (mypy), automated linting, and GitHub-based version control for all reporting systems and data pipelines.

experience.title: Student Development Coordinator (Part-Time)
highlights: Mentored and guided 15 students in the Data Analytics vertical, delivering high-quality professional and portfolio reviews that led to successful placements.
Evaluated weekly projects and homework submissions, providing actionable feedback on SQL schema designs, Tableau dashboards, and business insights.

experience.title: New Business Associate (Contract)
highlights: Coordinated standard cross-border operations across 5 countries to streamline Grab's 'Clean and Fix' and 'Attractions' features.
Analyzed historical operations records and engineered budget forecast models that shaped pricing parameters and competitor defensive positioning.

experience.title: Junior Partnership Analyst
highlights: Collaborated with external fintech partners to roll out working capital financing, pre-approved pay-later, and commercial insurance products.
Synthesized digital product velocity reports on a weekly basis, directly shaping Ralali's industrial inventory targets and pricing structures.
Parsed 110,000 transaction records to extract 10,740 highly qualified accounts for customized underwriting and credit segmentation programs.
